---
name: Security notice
about: Do not submit public vulnerability details. Use the private reporting link in the issue chooser.
title: "[Security]: private reporting required"
labels: security
assignees: ""
---

Do not include secrets, tokens, private keys, customer source code, private
prompts, confidential materials, regulated data, local absolute paths, raw
logs, raw screenshots, raw evidence bundles, generated private bundles, copied
worktrees, or vulnerability exploit details.

Do not submit vulnerability details through a public issue. Use the private
security reporting link from the issue chooser. If that private channel is not
available, this repository is not ready for public release and maintainers must
enable private vulnerability reporting before accepting security reports.

## Request

Maintainers must enable private vulnerability reporting or publish a monitored
private security contact before public release.
